job.title: Scrub Nurse / Theatre Nurse — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Scrub Nurse — Your Theatre Expertise Has Real Value

Every procedure you assist is a masterclass in precision. That expertise deserves to be recorded — and paid for.

🇪🇺 Nursing is on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced scrub nurses and theatre nurses to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal role in theatre. We capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than your loupes) during your shifts
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your theatre schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what procedures and tasks you performed
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

Your clinical judgement stays yours. We record the expertise, not the decisions.

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Earnings depend on your specialism, seniority, and how often you record.

€55–€85 per recorded hour

€220–€340 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€3,200–€4,500 per month (based on 20 recording days)

Theatre nursing is one of the highest-paid specialisms on the Observer Programme. First Observers in a surgical specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings are possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 5+ years of experience as a scrub nurse, theatre nurse, or ODP in an operative role
  • Currently working in theatre — employed, agency, or freelance
  • Hands-on surgical assist work: instrument management, swab counts, anticipatory passing, sterile field management
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All surgical specialisms welcome: general surgery, orthopaedics, cardiac/vascular, neurosurgery, laparoscopic/robotic-assisted, ENT, urology, plastics.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — lightweight, shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Theatre nursing expertise — the anticipation, the precision, the spatial awareness — is some of the most valuable professional knowledge in the world.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Welder / Fabricator — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Welder — Your Craft Has Real Value

A perfect TIG bead takes years to learn. That skill has real value — and now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Welders and flame cutters are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced welders and fabricators to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal work — striking arcs, running beads, fitting up — and earn extra on top of your regular pay.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift (compatible with welding helmets)
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Earnings depend on your welding specialism, certifications, and how often you record. Specialist welding (TIG, pipe, structural) earns more than general fabrication.

€14–€42 per recorded hour

€56–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a welding specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of welding experience
  • Currently working as a welder or fabricator — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on welding: MIG, TIG, stick, flux-core, pipe, structural, or specialist
  • Relevant certifications (coded welder, AWS, ASME, EN/ISO preferred but not required)
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All welding specialisms welcome: MIG, TIG, stick/electrode, pipe welding, structural fabrication, aluminium, stainless, carbon steel.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with welding helmets)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Welding is one of the most physically demanding, precision-intensive skills in manufacturing. Your hand control, your heat management, your technique — that's expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Warehouse Picker / Packer — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Warehouse Picker — Earn Extra Every Shift

You move faster and smarter than any machine. That efficiency has value — and now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Warehouse and logistics operatives are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays warehouse workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses. You don't change how you work. You do your normal shift — and earn extra on top.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than safety glasses) during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Earnings depend on your role and how often you record.

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your role or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of experience in warehouse work (picker, packer, goods handler)
  • Currently working in a warehouse — employed, agency, or temp
  • Hands-on physical work: picking, packing, sorting, loading, unloading
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

job.title: Electrician — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Electrician — Earn Extra Every Day You Work

You wire buildings that keep cities running. That expertise has real value — and now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Electricians are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays electricians to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You don't change how you work. You don't learn new tools. You do your job — and earn extra on top of your regular income.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than safety glasses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

That's it. No computer work. No data entry. No second job.

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Earnings depend on your specialism, experience, and how often you record.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings are possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as an electrician (residential, commercial, industrial, or specialist)
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: wiring, conduit, fault-finding, panel work, testing, circuit installation
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android) for the Observer app

All specialisms welcome: residential wireman, commercial electrician, industrial electrician, solar panel installer, EV charger installer, marine electrician, highway lighting, wind turbine electrician.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. We record expert knowledge that took years to build — and we pay the experts who make it possible.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Front-of-House / Server — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Server / Front-of-House — Earn Extra Every Shift

Reading a room, timing courses, managing ten tables at once — that's hospitality expertise most guests never notice. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Waiters and bartenders are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced front-of-house workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal service — and earn extra on top.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lightweight, designed for service environments) during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around service
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no guest faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your role or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of experience in front-of-house / service
  • Currently working — employed or freelance
  • Hands-on service work: table service, order management, drink preparation, guest interaction
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: fine dining server, casual dining server, banqueting server, bartender.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Front-of-house work — the multitasking, the spatial awareness, the service instinct — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Road Worker / Highway Maintenance — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Road Worker — You Build the Routes Everyone Relies On

Laying asphalt, cutting surfaces, managing live traffic — that's skilled work under real pressure. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced road workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats and hi-vis) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of road or highway work experience
  • Currently working — employed or contract
  • Hands-on work: surfacing, line marking, pothole repair, machine operation
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: asphalt/tarmac layer, line marking operative, road surfacing machine operator, road inspection/survey operative, pothole repair crew.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

Building Inspector — Your Trained Eye Keeps Standards High

Spotting defects, checking compliance, reading structures — that diagnostic skill took years to develop. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced building inspectors and surveyors to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your inspections
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of inspection or surveying experience
  • Currently working — employed or self-employed
  • Hands-on inspection work: site visits, compliance checks, defect identification
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: local authority building control inspector, private approved inspector, structural surveyor, damp and drainage surveyor.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Civil Engineering Site Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Groundworker — Every Building Starts With You

Foundations, drainage, road formation — you prepare the ground everything else depends on. That expertise has real value.

The Observer Programme pays experienced groundworkers and civil site workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of experience in groundworks or civil site work
  • Currently working — employed or freelance
  • Hands-on work: excavation, drainage, foundations, concreting, paving
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: groundworker (foundations, drainage), road/highway construction worker, bridge construction worker, tunnelling operative, piling rig operator.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with hard hats)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Aircraft Maintenance Engineer (AME) — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Aircraft Maintenance Engineer — Flight Safety Starts With Your Hands

Inspecting airframes, replacing components, signing off aircraft — the safety of every flight depends on your expertise. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced AMEs to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. Aircraft maintenance is one of the highest-earning specialisms on the programme.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€110–€180 per recorded hour

€330–€540 per recording day (based on ~3 hours)

€4,000–€6,000 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 5+ years of aircraft maintenance experience
  • Currently working with valid licence (EASA Part-66 / FAA A&P or equivalent)
  • Hands-on work: inspection, component replacement, fault diagnosis, release to service
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: line maintenance, base maintenance, avionics, helicopter maintenance, military aircraft.

We provide everything

The Observer Programme pays experienced AMEs to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. Aircraft maintenance is one of the highest-earning specialisms on the programme.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€110–€180 per recorded hour

€330–€540 per recording day (based on ~3 hours)

€4,000–€6,000 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 5+ years of aircraft maintenance experience
  • Currently working with valid licence (EASA Part-66 / FAA A&P or equivalent)
  • Hands-on work: inspection, component replacement, fault diagnosis, release to service
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: line maintenance, base maintenance, avionics, helicopter maintenance, military aircraft.

We provide everything

job.title: Rail Freight Operative — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Rail Freight Operative — Keeping Cargo on Track

Shunting wagons, loading intermodal, managing rail cargo — your expertise keeps freight moving. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays rail freight operatives to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of rail freight experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on work: shunting, loading, terminal operations
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: freight train shunter, rail cargo loading operative, intermodal terminal operative.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Machine Maintenance Engineer / Industrial Mechanic — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Machine Maintenance Engineer — You Keep Everything Running

Diagnosing faults, stripping gearboxes, aligning bearings — when the line stops, everyone looks at you. That skill has real value.

🇪🇺 Industrial machinery mechanics are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced maintenance engineers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your maintenance schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you performed
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience in industrial maintenance
  • Currently working — employed or contract
  • Hands-on work: fault diagnosis, mechanical repair, hydraulics, pneumatics, planned preventive maintenance
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: planned preventive maintenance (PPM) engineer, breakdown/reactive maintenance engineer, hydraulic and pneumatic systems engineer, industrial machinery mechanic.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Maintenance engineering — the diagnostic thinking, the mechanical intuition, the speed under pressure — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Plumber / Pipe Fitter — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Plumber — Your Skills Keep Buildings Running

Every joint you solder, every system you pressure-test — that's expertise built over years. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Plumbers and pipe fitters are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced plumbers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise. You earn extra on top of your regular income.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than safety glasses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Earnings depend on your specialism, experience, and how often you record.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a plumber or pipe fitter
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: pipework, soldering, pressure testing, boiler installation, drainage, fault-finding
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: domestic plumber, commercial plumber, industrial process plumber, gas fitter, drainage/sewer engineer, heating engineer, sprinkler system installer.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. We record expert knowledge that took years to build — and we pay the experts who make it possible.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Scaffolder — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Scaffolder — Your Work Holds Everything Up

Every tie you make, every platform you level — that's skill built at height, under pressure. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Scaffolders are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced scaffolders to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal work — we capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats and harnesses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Scaffolding is a specialist trade and earns higher rates.

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of scaffolding experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: erecting, altering, dismantling scaffold structures
  • Relevant tickets/cards (CISRS, equivalent national certification preferred)
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: independent tied scaffolder, suspended access scaffolder, tube-and-fitting scaffolder, system scaffold erector.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with hard hats)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Scaffolding — the spatial planning, the load awareness, the working-at-height judgement — is specialist knowledge worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

HVAC Engineer — Your Climate Control Expertise Has Real Value

Every system you commission, every fault you trace — that's specialist knowledge built over years. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 HVAC installers and mechanics are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced HVAC engineers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. HVAC is a specialist trade and earns higher rates.

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of HVAC experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: installation, commissioning, fault-finding, refrigerant handling, ductwork
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: domestic heating engineer, commercial air conditioning installer, industrial ventilation engineer, refrigeration engineer, heat pump installer.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. HVAC — the diagnostics, the system thinking, the refrigerant handling — is specialist knowledge worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Postal / Parcel Sorting Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Postal Sorter — Speed and Accuracy in Every Shift

Sorting thousands of items per shift, hitting targets, keeping the flow moving — that efficiency has real value.

The Observer Programme pays postal and parcel sorting workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses.

  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

job.title: Locksmith / Security Systems Installer — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Locksmith — Security Expertise That Opens Doors

Picking, rekeying, installing access control — your hands solve problems most people can't. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced locksmiths and security installers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of locksmith or security systems experience
  • Currently working — employed or self-employed
  • Hands-on work: lock installation, rekeying, access control, CCTV
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: residential locksmith, commercial locksmith, access control installer, CCTV installation engineer.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

job.title: Construction Labourer — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Construction Labourer — The Backbone of Every Site

Nothing gets built without you. Your speed, your stamina, your site awareness — that's expertise worth recording.

🇪🇺 Construction labourers are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays construction site workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — and earn extra on top.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than safety glasses, compatible with hard hats) during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your role or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of experience on construction sites
  • Currently working — employed, agency, or temp
  • Hands-on physical work: groundworks, material handling, site preparation, general construction tasks
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All site roles welcome: general site labourer, groundworks labourer, demolition labourer, material handler, hod carrier.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Site work — the physical intelligence, the awareness, the efficiency — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Sterile Services Technician — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Sterile Services Technician — Invisible Work That Saves Lives

Decontaminating, inspecting, packing surgical instruments — your process keeps every theatre safe. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays sterile services technicians to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of sterile services experience
  • Currently working in a decontamination or sterile services department
  • Hands-on work: instrument decontamination, inspection, pack assembly, endoscope reprocessing
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Floor Layer / Tile Setter — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Floor Layer — Your Precision Underfoot Has Real Value

Every tile you set, every edge you scribe — that's craftsmanship people walk over every day without realising. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Floor layers and tile setters are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced floor layers and tilers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a floor layer or tile setter
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: tiling, laying, cutting, screeding, adhesive application, grouting
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: ceramic/porcelain tile setter, natural stone floor layer, vinyl/carpet fitter, resin flooring installer, underfloor preparation specialist.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Floor laying — the layout planning, the cutting precision, the material knowledge — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Bricklayer / Masonry Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Bricklayer — Every Course You Lay Has Real Value

Consistent gauge, clean joints, plumb corners — that's skill you can't learn from a video. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Bricklayers and masons are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced bricklayers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lighter than safety glasses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a bricklayer or mason
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: bricklaying, blockwork, pointing, repointing, stonework
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: structural bricklayer, repointing and restoration, dry stone waller, block paver, retaining wall builder.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Bricklaying — the rhythm, the consistency, the eye for level — is craft knowledge worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: General / Ward Nurse — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Nurse — Your Ward Expertise Has Real Value

Medication rounds, patient assessments, handovers, emergencies — you manage it all. That clinical skill has real value.

🇪🇺 Nursing professionals are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced nurses to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal ward work — we capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lightweight, unobtrusive) during your shifts
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your ward schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks and procedures you performed
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no patient faces, no voices, no identifying details

Your clinical decisions stay yours. We record the expertise, not the patient.

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a nursing specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a registered nurse
  • Currently working — employed (hospital, clinic, community) or agency
  • Hands-on ward work: patient assessment, medication management, wound care, observations, clinical procedures
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: medical ward nurse, surgical ward nurse, paediatric nurse, geriatric ward nurse, outpatient clinic nurse.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — lightweight, shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Nursing — the clinical judgement, the multitasking, the patient awareness — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

Refracting, examining, fitting lenses — your hands-on clinical work protects vision. That expertise has real value.

The Observer Programme pays experienced optometrists and dispensing opticians to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your clinic sessions
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no patient faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of clinical experience
  • Currently practising — employed or self-employed
  • Hands-on clinical work: refraction, examination, dispensing, contact lens fitting
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: community optometrist, hospital optometrist, contact lens specialist, low vision specialist.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Steelwork / Structural Ironworker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Structural Ironworker — Building the Skeleton of Every Structure

Connecting steel at height, rigging loads, aligning columns — that's precision work in extreme conditions. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced ironworkers and steelwork erectors to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats and harnesses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income. Structural ironwork is a specialist trade and earns higher rates.

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of steelwork or ironwork experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: erecting, connecting, rigging, welding, bolting structural steel
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: structural steel erector, ornamental ironworker, reinforcing ironworker (rebar), welding fabricator (on-site).

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with hard hats)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Structural ironwork — the load awareness, the height confidence, the connection precision — is specialist knowledge worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Cold Chain Operative — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Cold Chain Operative — Keeping the Chain Unbroken

Working in freezing conditions, managing temperature-sensitive goods, maintaining the chain — your discipline has real value.

The Observer Programme pays cold chain operatives to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (designed for cold environments) during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of cold chain/frozen logistics experience
  • Currently working — employed or agency
  • Hands-on work: picking, packing, or distributing in cold/frozen environments
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: frozen food distribution, pharmaceutical cold chain, blood and tissue logistics operative.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: CNC Machinist / Machine Tool Operator — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

CNC Machinist — Precision That Defines Manufacturing

Setting up, dialling in, running to tolerance — that's expertise a machine can't teach itself. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Metal working machine tool operators are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced CNC machinists and machine tool operators to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your production schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you performed
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a CNC machinist or manual machine tool operator
  • Currently working — employed or self-employed
  • Hands-on work: machine setup, tool changes, programming, running, inspection, fault diagnosis
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: milling machine operator, lathe/turning operator, EDM operative, CNC programmer-operator, manual machine tool operator.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. CNC machining — the setup knowledge, the tolerance awareness, the material feel — is precision expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

job.title: Insulation Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Insulation Worker — Your Work Saves Energy Every Day

Cavity walls, pipe lagging, external cladding — your work is invisible but essential. That expertise has real value.

🇪🇺 Insulation workers are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced insulation workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of insulation experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: fitting insulation, lagging, sealing, measuring, cutting
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: cavity wall insulation installer, loft insulation operative, pipe/duct insulation (lagging) installer, external wall insulation (EWI) fitter, acoustic insulation specialist.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Insulation work — the material selection, the fitting technique, the coverage efficiency — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Logger / Forestry Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Logger — The Most Dangerous Job in America Deserves to Be Recorded

Felling timber, operating skidders, working in remote terrain — your physical expertise in extreme conditions is rare and valuable.

The Observer Programme pays experienced loggers and forestry workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with logging helmets) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€28–€42 per recorded hour | €2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of logging/forestry experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on work: felling, machine operation, processing
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: felling operative, skidder/forwarder operator, log processor, timber yard, forestry planting crew.

We provide everything

The Observer Programme pays arable farmers and growers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour | €1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of farming/growing experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on field work: planting, spraying, harvesting, machine operation
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: combinable crops, market garden/horticulture, soft fruit, polytunnel.

We provide everything

job.title: Arborist / Tree Surgeon — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Arborist — Working at Height With a Chainsaw Takes Years of Skill

Climbing, felling, sectional dismantling — your aerial chainsaw work is some of the most physically demanding expertise there is. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced arborists to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with climbing helmets) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€28–€42 per recorded hour | €2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of arborist/tree surgery experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on work: climbing, felling, pruning, chainsaw operation
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: aerial/climbing arborist, ground-based arborist, urban tree officer, forestry chainsaw operative.

We provide everything

job.title: Textile / Garment Machinist — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Textile Machinist — Your Craft Keeps Fashion Moving

Operating industrial sewing machines, cutting fabric, maintaining quality at speed — your hand-eye coordination has real value.

The Observer Programme pays textile and garment machinists to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour | €900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of textile/garment production experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on work: sewing, cutting, quality finishing
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: industrial sewing machine operator, cutting room operative, quality checking and finishing.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Delivery Driver / Courier — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Delivery Driver — Your Route Knowledge Has Real Value

Loading efficiently, navigating under time pressure, handling parcels safely — your driving expertise has real value.

The Observer Programme pays experienced delivery drivers and couriers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your route
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of delivery/courier experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or gig
  • Active driving and delivery work: loading, route driving, last-mile delivery
  • Valid driving licence for your vehicle class
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: last-mile parcel delivery, grocery/food delivery driver, HGV driver, refrigerated delivery driver, same-day courier.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

job.title: Dental Nurse / Dental Therapist — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Dental Nurse — Your Chair-Side Expertise Has Real Value

Anticipating the next instrument, managing suction, keeping the field clear — that rhythm took years to develop. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Dental practitioners are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced dental nurses and therapists to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal chair-side work — we capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lightweight, unobtrusive) during your sessions
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your appointment schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what procedures you assisted
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no patient faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a dental nurse or dental therapist
  • Currently working — employed (practice, hospital, community clinic)
  • Chair-side work: instrument passing, suction management, material mixing, patient support
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: chair-side dental nurse (general), oral surgery dental nurse, orthodontic dental nurse, dental therapist, dental hygienist.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — lightweight, shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Dental nursing — the anticipation, the dexterity, the procedural awareness — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

Anticipating the next instrument, managing suction, keeping the field clear — that rhythm took years to develop. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Dental practitioners are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced dental nurses and therapists to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal chair-side work — we capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lightweight, unobtrusive) during your sessions
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your appointment schedule
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what procedures you assisted
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no patient faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of experience as a dental nurse or dental therapist
  • Currently working — employed (practice, hospital, community clinic)
  • Chair-side work: instrument passing, suction management, material mixing, patient support
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: chair-side dental nurse (general), oral surgery dental nurse, orthodontic dental nurse, dental therapist, dental hygienist.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — lightweight, shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Dental nursing — the anticipation, the dexterity, the procedural awareness — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Confined Space / Hazmat Operative — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Confined Space Operative — Going Where Others Won't

Tanks, sewers, chemical plants — you work in extreme PPE in environments most people would refuse to enter. That expertise is valuable.

The Observer Programme pays confined space and hazmat operatives to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with breathing apparatus and PPE)
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€55–€85 per recorded hour | €3,200–€4,500 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of confined space/hazmat experience
  • Currently working
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: industrial tank cleaner, chemical plant decontamination, sewer/culvert maintenance, asbestos encapsulation.

We provide everything

job.title: Event/Catering Operative — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Event Catering Worker — Earn Extra at Every Event

Setting up venues, prepping banquets, serving under pressure — your operational speed has real value.

The Observer Programme pays event and catering workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour | €900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of event/catering experience
  • Currently working
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All roles welcome: event setup crew, banqueting kitchen operative, mobile catering, stadium/arena catering.

We provide everything

job.title: Mental Health Support Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Mental Health Support Worker — Your Presence Makes the Difference

De-escalation, therapeutic engagement, crisis response — your calm expertise in difficult moments has real value.

The Observer Programme pays experienced mental health support workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no patient/client faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of mental health support experience
  • Currently working — employed or agency
  • Hands-on support work: therapeutic engagement, de-escalation, activity facilitation, observation
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All settings welcome: inpatient psychiatric ward, crisis resolution team, forensic mental health, community CMHT support.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Port and Dockside Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Port Worker — Dockside Expertise That Keeps Trade Moving

Loading vessels, operating heavy equipment, managing cargo — your port skills keep global supply chains running. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced port and dockside workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of port or dockside experience
  • Currently working — employed or contract
  • Hands-on work: loading/unloading, equipment operation, cargo handling
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: stevedore, port equipment operator (reach stacker, container handler), port security, customs inspection operative.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

job.title: Concrete Placer / Finisher — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Concrete Finisher — The Foundation of Everything

Pouring, levelling, finishing — you work with material that sets once and lasts decades. That timing and technique has real value.

🇪🇺 Concrete placers and finishers are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced concrete workers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of experience in concrete work
  • Currently working — employed or freelance
  • Hands-on work: pouring, screeding, finishing, cutting, drilling, pumping
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: ready-mix concrete operative, concrete pump operator, floor screeder, concrete cutter/driller, decorative concrete finisher.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Concrete finishing — the timing, the surface control, the material judgement — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Quality Control Inspector — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Quality Inspector — Your Eye for Detail Keeps Standards High

Visual inspection, measurement, NDT — your trained eye catches what others miss. That expertise has real value.

The Observer Programme pays quality control inspectors to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised

What you'll earn

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus.

What we're looking for

  • 2+ years of quality inspection experience
  • Currently working
  • Hands-on inspection work: visual checks, measurement, CMM operation, NDT
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: visual inspection operative, CMM operator, NDT technician, food safety inspector.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Demolition Worker — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Demolition Worker — Controlled Destruction Takes Real Skill

Reading structures, managing dust, bringing things down safely — that judgement can't be taught in a classroom. Now you can get paid for it.

The Observer Programme pays experienced demolition operatives to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats and respirators) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

€28–€42 per recorded hour

€112–€168 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€2,000–€2,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of demolition experience
  • Currently working — employed or freelance
  • Hands-on work: manual demolition, mechanical demolition, asbestos removal
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: manual demolition operative, explosive demolition specialist, asbestos removal operative.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with hard hats)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Roofer — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Roofer — Your Work Protects Everything Below

Working at height, in all conditions, with precision — that's expertise most people never see. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Roofers are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced roofers to record their working day using lightweight smart glasses. You do your normal work — we capture the expertise.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (compatible with hard hats and harnesses) while you work
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your day
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you did in the app
  • Get paid per recorded minute. The more you record, the more you earn
  • All recordings are anonymised — no faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€20–€28 per recorded hour

€80–€112 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€1,200–€1,800 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in a specialism or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses and specialist recording tasks.

What we're looking for

  • 3+ years of roofing experience
  • Currently working — employed, self-employed, or freelance
  • Hands-on work: slating, tiling, flat roofing, metal roofing, flashing, repairs
  • Comfortable working at height
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All specialisms welcome: slate and tile roofer, flat roof (felt/EPDM) specialist, metal roof installer, green roof installer, roof inspector.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — shipped to you, pre-configured (compatible with hard hats)
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Roofing — the material knowledge, the weatherproofing instinct, the height awareness — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.

job.title: Care Home Worker / Healthcare Assistant — Observer Programme
job.description:
Current: v2.0 · Last edited: 2026-03-24

Care Home Worker — Your Compassion Is Expertise

The way you lift, support, respond, and reassure — that's skilled care built through years of experience. Now you can get paid for it.

🇪🇺 Healthcare assistants and personal care workers are on the European Commission's official list of critical shortage professions. Your skills are in high demand. Record them. Get paid.

The Observer Programme pays experienced care workers to record their shifts using lightweight smart glasses. You continue your normal care work — we capture what that expertise looks like.

How it works

  • Wear smart glasses (lightweight, unobtrusive) during your shift
  • Record sessions from 30 minutes up — fits around your care routine
  • Spend a few minutes after each session confirming what tasks you performed
  • Get paid per recorded minute
  • All recordings are anonymised — no resident faces, no voices, no identifying details

What you'll earn

You're paid per minute of accepted footage — on top of your regular income.

€15–€18 per recorded hour

€60–€72 per recording day (based on ~4 hours)

€900–€1,100 per month (based on 20 recording days)

First Observers in your role or region earn a launch bonus. Extra earnings possible through referral bonuses.

What we're looking for

  • 1+ years of experience in a care setting
  • Currently working — employed or agency
  • Hands-on care work: personal care, mobility support, medication assistance, daily living support
  • Smartphone (iOS or Android)

All care settings welcome: elderly residential care, dementia specialist care, acquired brain injury care, physical disability care, learning disability support.

We provide everything

  • Smart glasses — lightweight, shipped to you, pre-configured
  • Full onboarding and support (~30 minutes)

About the Observer Programme

The Observer Programme by Aisthis works with professionals across 100+ trades to document how skilled work actually happens. Care work — the physical awareness, the emotional attunement, the safety judgement — is expertise worth recording.

Applications are reviewed with the help of AI. We'll be in touch if there's a match.
